wait_msg: Please do not close this page
or_click: Or click the button below to browse
delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this item?
delete_batch_msg: Are you sure you want to delete {n} selected items? Cannot be undone!
toast_tg_timeout: Telegram connection took too long, please try again.
toast_only_files: Please select files only (Folder download not supported).
toast_skipped_folders: Automatically skipped folders in the list.
preview_error: Could not load preview. Please download to view.
preview_manual: Do you want to preview the content of this file?
preview_blocked: File is too large to preview. Please download to view full content.
webdav_desc: Use TeleCloud as a network drive on your computer.
webdav_note: Use the administrator account/password to connect. Host: web address, Protocol: HTTP/HTTPS, Port: application port, Path: /webdav
webdav_setup_guide:
Configuration depends on your WebDAV client:

1. Separate Port field (e.g., RaiDrive)
  • Host: Your IP/Domain (without http or port)
  • Port: The running web port
  • Path: /webdav
  • Protocol: HTTP (or HTTPS if SSL is enabled)
2. Single URL field (e.g., Windows Map Network Drive)
  • Enter the full URL: http(s)://[IP]:[Port]/webdav

Summary: If asked for a Port separately, extract it. Otherwise, include it in the URL.
setup_desc: Create an admin account to continue
err_folder_exists: A folder with this name already exists in root directory!
err_invalid_username_format: Username can only contain letters, numbers, dots, underscores and hyphens!
err_too_many_requests: Too many requests, please try again later!
err_ip_blocked: You have been blocked due to too many failed attempts!
err_failed_to_open_temp_file: Failed to open temporary file on server!
err_tg_msgid: Failed to get MessageID from Telegram!
err_admin_disabled: Admin has not enabled this feature for child accounts!
file_not_found_msg: File not found or link has been revoked.
update_msg: A new version is available on GitHub. Do you want to check it out?
upload_api_desc: Allow remote file uploads via HTTP API with Bearer Token. Use for scripts, CI/CD integrations, etc.
upload_api_no_key: No API Key yet. Click Generate to create one.
api_key_delete_msg: Are you sure you want to delete the API Key? Integrations using this key will lose access.
api_toggle_error: Failed to change Upload API status!
admin_toggle_note: You are managing settings for the entire system.
child_toggle_note: This setting only applies to your own account.
upload_api_warning: Keep your API Key secret. Anyone with this key can upload files to your TeleCloud.
upload_api_param_share: Set "public" to auto-create a share link and get share_link + direct_link in response
upload_api_sync_note: Synchronous API — the response is only returned when the Telegram upload is fully complete. Pay attention to script/curl Timeout and Reverse Proxy upload time limit if applicable.
upload_api_param_async: Set "true" to upload in background and get task_id immediately (Ignored if share=public)
users_desc: Manage child accounts and their permissions.
delete_user_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete {u}? Their folder will remain.
toast_user_created: Account created successfully! Default password is abc123
reset_admin_desc: Please set a new password for your administrator account.
reset_error: An error occurred during password reset.
reset_password_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to reset password for {u} to default (abc123)? User will be forced to change password on next login.
force_password_change_msg: This is your first login or your password has been reset. Please set a new password to continue.
remote_upload_note: The system will fetch the file directly from the URL to Telegram via the server.
remote_no_thumb_warning: Note: Downloading Videos/Audio via URL will not automatically generate thumbnails.
err_forbidden_url: Cannot download from this URL (Internal IP blocked)!
err_remote_not_found: File not found at this URL (404 Not Found).
err_remote_failed: Connection to URL failed or refused.
err_invalid_url: Invalid URL format (must start with http/https)!
passkey_desc: Use biometrics or security keys for faster and safer login.
passkey_not_supported: Passkeys are not supported on this browser
passkey_name_prompt: Enter a name for this Passkey (e.g., My iPhone, MacBook...):
passkey_rpid_help: Your domain name (e.g., cloud.example.com). Leave empty for localhost.
passkey_origins_help: Allowed URLs, comma-separated. Must include protocol and port if applicable (e.g., https://cloud.example.com).
err_passkey_not_configured: Passkey is not configured on this system. Please configure this in the Admin account settings.
